# Purpose
This code is a C source file that defines a set of empty functions related to analytics operations. The functions [`analytics_external_update`](<#analytics_external_update>), [`analytics_external_battery_init`](<#analytics_external_battery_init>), [`analytics_external_collect_app_cpu_stats`](<#analytics_external_collect_app_cpu_stats>), [`analytics_external_collect_app_flash_read_stats`](<#analytics_external_collect_app_flash_read_stats>), and [`analytics_external_collect_kernel_heap_stats`](<#analytics_external_collect_kernel_heap_stats>) are declared but not implemented, indicating placeholders for future development. These functions suggest an interface for collecting and updating various analytics data, such as CPU statistics, flash read statistics, and kernel heap statistics.
